title: ‘Parliament has not been immune to AI slop’: The EU is about to roll out its own AI platform — including tools from OpenAI, Meta, Anthropic and Mistral
summary: Multiple Members of European Parliament (MEPs) have raised concerns about the growing use of AI within the European Parliament, prompting the development of a platform that doesn’t feed sensitive information into public models.
caption: output/2026-07-20/parliament-has-not-been-immune-to-ai-slop-the-eu-is-about-to-roll-out-.txt
